title: Explicit statement discloses a protected synthetic SECRET
syntheticDataDisclosure: Synthetic SECRET fixture only; the hidden claim, prose, people, and identifiers are invented and contain no real user or private-project data.

acceptedSegment.text: Vela set the cracked compass between them. "It never pointed north," she told Jorn. "It points to the buried relay beneath the glass marsh."

evidenceSpans.text: Vela set the cracked compass between them. "It never pointed north," she told Jorn. "It points to the buried relay beneath the glass marsh."

findings.summary: Jorn now knows the cracked compass secretly marks a hidden relay rather than a heading.
findings.uncertaintyOrRivalReading: The relay's existence may still be false in-world, but Vela explicitly disclosed the protected claim to Jorn.
